iti21:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti21:2.1:
“Monks, there is the case where a certain person is clear-minded.
Having encompassed that mind with [my] awareness, I discern,
iti21:2.2: ‘If this person were to die at this instant, then as if he were to be carried off, he would thus be placed in heaven.’
iti21:2.5:
It’s because of clear-mindedness that there are cases where some beings–
at the break-up of the body, after death–reappear in a heavenly world.”
iti21:3.3: the One Awakened explained its meaning
iti21:3.4: in the presence of the monks.
iti21:4.2: were to die at this instant,
iti21:5.1: as if he were carried off
iti21:5.4: that beings go to a good destination.
